tracks.meaning: a visual output device or screen that shows images, text, or data generated by a computer or electronic device
to show, exhibit, or present something publicly or visibly
an arrangement or presentation of performers, decorations, or props on a stage
a demonstration or explanation of something designed to inform or impress an audience
a tactical arrangement or positioning of troops or equipment in formation
in anatomy, the visible showing of symptoms or physical characteristics of a condition
the manifestation or demonstration of a behavioral, emotional, or psychological response
an impressive but superficial or misleading presentation intended to create a favorable impression
an arrangement of merchandise or goods in a shop window or on shelves for sale
the setting out or arrangement of text and images on a printed page or document
